incident: Internal origin server (api.internal.acme.com) degrades: escalating latency -> 502/503 cascade across cart/checkout/orders routes, plus CPU time limit exceeded on checkout; concurrent recurring KV_NAMESPACE_NOT_FOUND distractor on session lookups

ground_truth.desc: escalating latency warnings before origin went down

ground_truth.needle: upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers

ground_truth.desc: edge function exceeded 50ms CPU budget on retries

ground_truth.needle: typeerror: cannot read properties of undefined
ground_truth.desc: null-deref in orders handler when upstream returned empty body
recurring benign KV misconfiguration distractor unrelated to the outage
